create-and-populate-table-pdf.title: Create and Populate a Table in a PDF
create-and-populate-table-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically create a Table, add rows and cells, apply basic styling, and save the result as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-table-into-pdf.title: Insert Table into Existing PDF Page
insert-table-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a formatted table with header and data rows, position it on a specific page, and save the updated document.

auto-fit-table-columns-to-content.title: AutoFit Table Columns to Content in PDF
auto-fit-table-columns-to-content.description: Creates a PDF with a table whose column widths automatically adjust to fit the cell contents using ColumnAdjustment.AutoFitToContent.

auto-fit-table-to-page-width.title: Stretch Table Across Page Width in PDF
auto-fit-table-to-page-width.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with a table that automatically stretches to fill the page width by setting the table's auto‑fit behavior. The example adds header and data rows and saves the document.

insert-svg-image-into-table-cell.title: Insert SVG Image into a PDF Table Cell
insert-svg-image-into-table-cell.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a table, and place an SVG image inside a table cell using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-html-fragment-in-table-cell.title: Embed HTML Fragment in Table Cell
embed-html-fragment-in-table-cell.description: Shows how to insert HTML markup into a PDF table cell by adding an HtmlFragment to the cell's paragraph collection using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-page-break-after-table-row.title: Insert Page Break After Table Row in PDF
insert-page-break-after-table-row.description: Demonstrates how to force a specific table row onto a new page in a PDF by setting the IsInNewPage property, creating a page break after a given row.

render-table-on-new-pdf-page.title: Render Table on a New PDF Page
render-table-on-new-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to create a new PDF page, build a table with header and data rows, and add it to the page using Aspose.Pdf.

merge-table-columns-using-cell-colspan.title: Merge Table Columns Using Cell.ColSpan
merge-table-columns-using-cell-colspan.description: Creates a PDF document with a table where a cell spans three adjacent columns by setting the Cell.ColSpan property.

merge-table-cells-vertically-rowspan.title: Merge Table Cells Vertically Using RowSpan
merge-table-cells-vertically-rowspan.description: Shows how to set the RowSpan property of a table cell to merge it with the cell directly below, creating a vertically spanning cell in a PDF table.

set-cell-margins-in-pdf-table.title: Set Cell Margins in a PDF Table
set-cell-margins-in-pdf-table.description: Shows how to create a PDF document with a table and apply custom margins to a table cell using Aspose.Pdf's MarginInfo object.

set-default-cell-padding-for-pdf-table.title: Set Default Cell Padding for a PDF Table
set-default-cell-padding-for-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to create a MarginInfo object and assign it to Table.DefaultCellPadding to apply uniform padding to all cells in an Aspose.Pdf table.

get-rendered-table-width.title: Get Rendered Table Width in PDF
get-rendered-table-width.description: Shows how to create a table in a PDF, let Aspose.Pdf layout it, and then read the calculated width of the rendered table.

import-datatable-into-pdf-table.title: Import DataTable into a PDF Table
import-datatable-into-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to populate an Aspose.Pdf Table directly from an in‑memory DataTable using Table.ImportDataTable and save the result as a PDF.

import-filtered-dataview-into-pdf-table.title: Import Filtered DataView into PDF Table
import-filtered-dataview-into-pdf-table.description: Shows how to import a filtered DataView into an Aspose.Pdf Table, add it to a page, and save the result as a PDF document.

import-datatable-into-pdf-table__v2.title: Import DataTable into PDF Table with Aspose.Pdf
import-datatable-into-pdf-table__v2.description: Demonstrates creating an in‑memory DataTable, configuring an Aspose.Pdf Table (adjustment, borders, column widths) and importing the DataTable into the PDF before saving the document.

determine-table-break-status.title: Determine Table Break Status on a PDF Page
determine-table-break-status.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to check whether a table will be split across pages by reading the Table.IsBroken property and how to force a break manually.

table-with-repeating-header-and-column.title: Table with Repeating Header Row and Column
table-with-repeating-header-and-column.description: Demonstrates how to mark a table header row and the first column as repeating so they stay visible on each new page when the table spans multiple pages in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-tables-from-pdf.title: Extract Tables from PDF Using TableAbsorber
extract-tables-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to detect tables, and iterate through tables, rows, cells, and text fragments to retrieve content and positions.

replace-table-in-pdf.title: Replace Table in PDF with a New Table
replace-table-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate a table on a PDF page using TableAbsorber, create a new Table positioned over the original rectangle, and replace the absorbed table with the new one using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-table-from-pdf.title: Remove a Table from PDF using TableAbsorber
remove-table-from-pdf.description: Shows how to locate tables in a PDF with TableAbsorber, delete the first found table, and save the modified document.

remove-all-tables-from-pdf.title: Remove All Tables from a PDF Document
remove-all-tables-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate every table in a PDF using TableAbsorber, remove them from their pages, and save the modified document.

batch-add-table-with-logo-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Table with Company Logo to PDFs
batch-add-table-with-logo-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files, inserting a two‑column table containing a company logo and name at the top of each document, and saving the results to an output directory.

batch-replace-tables-in-multiple-pdfs.title: Batch Replace Tables in Multiple PDFs
batch-replace-tables-in-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables in each PDF using TableAbsorber and replace them with new tables across a folder of documents.

apply-different-autofit-behaviors-to-mul.title: Apply Different AutoFit Behaviors to Multiple Tables
apply-different-autofit-behaviors-to-mul.description: Creates a PDF containing two tables and shows how to assign distinct AutoFit behaviors—AutoFitToContent and AutoFitToWindow—by setting the ColumnAdjustment property after importing data.

set-cell-background-color-in-pdf-table.title: Set Cell Background Color in PDF Table
set-cell-background-color-in-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document with a table and apply a background color to a specific cell using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-solid-border-to-pdf-table.title: Apply Solid Border to PDF Table
apply-solid-border-to-pdf-table.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a three‑column table, and applies a uniform solid black border around the entire table.

insert-external-image-into-table-cell.title: Insert External Image into Table Cell
insert-external-image-into-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to add an external image file to a PDF table cell using Aspose.Pdf's Image class.

insert-image-from-memory-stream-into-tab.title: Insert Image from Memory Stream into Table Cell
insert-image-from-memory-stream-into-tab.description: Shows how to generate an image in memory, write it to a MemoryStream, and embed it into a PDF table cell using Aspose.Pdf's Image class.

add-styled-text-to-table-cell.title: Add Styled Text to a Table Cell in PDF
add-styled-text-to-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to insert a TextFragment with a specific font, size, and color into a table cell of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-centered-paragraph-to-table-cell.title: Add Centered Paragraph to Table Cell in PDF
add-centered-paragraph-to-table-cell.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, insert a table, and place a centered paragraph inside a table cell using Aspose.Pdf.

set-cell-vertical-alignment-middle.title: Set Cell Vertical Alignment to Middle in PDF Table
set-cell-vertical-alignment-middle.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF table with Aspose.Pdf and set the vertical alignment of cell contents to the middle using the Cell.VerticalAlignment property.

center-align-table-in-pdf.title: Center Align Table in PDF
center-align-table-in-pdf.description: Shows how to create a table, set its HorizontalAlignment to Center, and insert it into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

offset-table-position.title: Offset Table Position in PDF
offset-table-position.description: Shows how to shift a table away from the left margin in a PDF by setting the Table.Margin.Left property using Aspose.Pdf.

enable-table-splitting-across-pdf-pages.title: Enable Table Splitting Across PDF Pages
enable-table-splitting-across-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF table that can break across multiple pages by setting Table.IsBroken to true and populating it with many rows.

prevent-table-splitting.title: Prevent Table Splitting Across PDF Pages
prevent-table-splitting.description: Shows how to keep an Aspose.Pdf table on a single page by setting Table.IsBroken to false, even when the content exceeds the page height.

add-table-with-remaining-page-space.title: Add Table Within Remaining Page Space
add-table-with-remaining-page-space.description: Demonstrates how to calculate the free vertical space on a PDF page by subtracting margins and existing content height, then adds a table only if it fits within that space.

create-fixed-width-table.title: Create Fixed-Width Table in PDF
create-fixed-width-table.description: Shows how to generate a PDF with a table whose width is fixed to 500 points using Aspose.Pdf for C#.

set-table-width-percentage.title: Set Table Width as Percentage in PDF
set-table-width-percentage.description: Shows how to create a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, add a table, and define its width as 80% of the page using the ColumnWidths property.

map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-table.title: Map DataTable Columns to PDF Table Using Column Mapping
map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to reorder a DataTable based on a column‑mapping dictionary and import the reordered data into an Aspose.Pdf Table within a PDF document.

create-pdf-table-from-filtered-dataview.title: Create PDF Table from Filtered DataView
create-pdf-table-from-filtered-dataview.description: Shows how to filter rows in a DataView and import the filtered records into an Aspose.Pdf Table, then save the result as a PDF document.

populate-pdf-table-from-linq-datatable.title: Populate PDF Table from LINQ DataTable
populate-pdf-table-from-linq-datatable.description: Demonstrates executing a LINQ query, loading the results into a DataTable, and importing that DataTable into an Aspose.Pdf Table which is then saved as a PDF document.

add-table-to-specific-pdf-page.title: Add Table to Specific PDF Page
add-table-to-specific-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a table with header and data rows, and insert it into a designated page using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-table-after-paragraph.title: Insert Table After Specific Paragraph in PDF
insert-table-after-paragraph.description: Demonstrates locating a paragraph containing a marker text and inserting a Table immediately after it in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-table-before-image.title: Insert Table Before an Image in PDF
insert-table-before-image.description: Shows how to locate an image on each PDF page and insert a table directly before it using Aspose.Pdf.

create-repeating-table-header.title: Create Repeating Table Header in a Tagged PDF
create-repeating-table-header.description: Demonstrates how to add a table with a header row that repeats on each new page by using the tagged PDF structure in Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-table-with-styled-header-row.title: Create PDF Table with Styled Header Row
create-pdf-table-with-styled-header-row.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF, add a table, and apply a distinct background color and bold font to the header row cells using Aspose.Pdf.

add-table-footer-to-pdf.title: Add Table Footer Row to PDF Using Tagged Content
add-table-footer-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a table with header, body, and a footer row that repeats at the bottom of each page using Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API.

alternating-row-colors-pdf-table.title: Apply Alternating Row Colors in PDF Table
alternating-row-colors-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF table with Aspose.Pdf, add data rows, and set alternating background colors for each row based on its index.

add-hyperlink-to-table-cell.title: Add Hyperlink to Table Cell in PDF
add-hyperlink-to-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to create a table in a PDF, define a rectangle over a cell, and attach a LinkAnnotation that opens an external URL when the cell text is clicked.

add-checkbox-to-table-cell.title: Add Checkbox Form Field Inside a Table Cell
add-checkbox-to-table-cell.description: Shows how to create a PDF table, calculate the cell coordinates, and insert a CheckboxField form element into that cell using Aspose.Pdf.

add-radio-button-group-to-table-cell.title: Add Radio Button Group to a PDF Table Cell
add-radio-button-group-to-table-cell.description: Demonstrates creating a RadioButtonField, grouping its options with a common name, and placing the radio buttons inside a table cell of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

export-table-structure-to-json.title: Export Table Structure to JSON
export-table-structure-to-json.description: Shows how to traverse tagged tables in a PDF, collect row and cell metadata, and serialize the complete table structure to a JSON file.

export-pdf-tables-to-csv.title: Export PDF Tables to CSV
export-pdf-tables-to-csv.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to extract tables from a PDF document and write each cell's text to a comma‑separated values (CSV) file.

render-table-from-xml-to-pdf.title: Render Table from XML to PDF
render-table-from-xml-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a table definition from an XML file into a DataTable, converting it to an Aspose.Pdf Table, and saving the rendered table as a PDF document.

count-tables-in-pdf.title: Count Tables in a PDF using TableAbsorber
count-tables-in-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to detect tables in a PDF document and retrieve the total count.

extract-table-coordinates-from-pdf.title: Extract Table Coordinates from PDF
extract-table-coordinates-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables in a PDF using TableAbsorber and retrieve each table's bounding rectangle coordinates.

extract-text-from-pdf-tables.title: Extract Text from PDF Tables Using TableAbsorber
extract-text-from-pdf-tables.description: Shows how to locate tables in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber and read the concatenated text of each cell.

replace-keyword-in-pdf-table-cells.title: Replace Keyword in PDF Table Cells
replace-keyword-in-pdf-table-cells.description: Demonstrates how to locate table cells containing a specific keyword in a PDF and replace the cell text using Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber and TextFragment classes.

remove-table-column.title: Remove a Column from a PDF Table
remove-table-column.description: Demonstrates how to locate a table in a PDF, rebuild it without a specific column by copying cell contents, and replace the original table using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-new-column-into-pdf-table.title: Insert New Column into PDF Table
insert-new-column-into-pdf-table.description: Shows how to add a new column to an existing table in a PDF by inserting a Cell into each Row at a specified zero‑based index using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-table-columns.title: Reorder Table Columns in a PDF
reorder-table-columns.description: Shows how to absorb an existing PDF table, rearrange its cells to a new column order, and replace the original table with the reordered version using Aspose.Pdf.

adjust-table-column-widths-proportionall.title: Adjust Table Column Widths Proportionally in PDF
adjust-table-column-widths-proportionall.description: Shows how to calculate proportional column widths and apply them to a PDF table using Aspose.Pdf.

set-minimum-column-width.title: Set Minimum Column Width for Table Columns
set-minimum-column-width.description: Demonstrates how to define a default minimum column width for a table in a PDF and optionally set explicit column widths using Aspose.Pdf.

set-maximum-column-width-pdf-tables.title: Set Maximum Column Width for PDF Tables
set-maximum-column-width-pdf-tables.description: Shows how to limit the width of table columns in a PDF by setting the DefaultColumnWidth (and optionally ColumnWidths) using Aspose.Pdf.

auto-numbered-table.title: Create Auto‑Numbered Table in PDF
auto-numbered-table.description: Shows how to add a table to a PDF document and automatically insert sequential numbers into the first column of each row.

add-table-with-semi-transparent-backgrou.title: Add Table with Semi-Transparent Background to PDF
add-table-with-semi-transparent-backgrou.description: Demonstrates creating a table, applying a semi‑transparent background color, and inserting it into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-table-background-color-gradient-work.title: Add Table Background Color with Gradient Workaround
add-table-background-color-gradient-work.description: Demonstrates setting a solid background color for an Aspose.Pdf Table and explains that gradient backgrounds are not directly supported, providing a commented workaround using Graph and GradientAxialShading.

apply-shadow-effect-to-pdf-table.title: Apply Shadow Effect to a PDF Table
apply-shadow-effect-to-pdf-table.description: Shows how to create a table in a PDF document and add a shadow effect by configuring the Table.ShadowEffect property.

set-table-zindex.title: Set Table Z-Index in PDF
set-table-zindex.description: Demonstrates how to control the overlapping order of a table in a PDF by setting its ZIndex property using Aspose.Pdf.

add-table-to-textboxfield.title: Add Table Appearance to a TextBox Form Field
add-table-to-textboxfield.description: Demonstrates creating a TextBox form field, building a tagged PDF table structure, and linking the table as the field's appearance using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-table-after-paragraph__v2.title: Insert Table After Paragraph in PDF
insert-table-after-paragraph__v2.description: Shows how to add a text fragment to a PDF page and then insert a table directly after that paragraph using Aspose.Pdf.

import-datatable-images-into-pdf-table.title: Import DataTable Images into PDF Table
import-datatable-images-into-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates loading image bytes from a DataTable and inserting them into a PDF table, rendering each image inside a table cell using Aspose.Pdf.Image objects.

render-high-dpi-image-in-table.title: Render High‑DPI Image in a PDF Table Cell
render-high-dpi-image-in-table.description: Demonstrates how to add a high‑resolution image to a table cell in a PDF by enabling resolution handling and scaling the image before saving the document.

generate-pdf-report-multiple-tables.title: Generate PDF Report with Multiple Tables from DataTables
generate-pdf-report-multiple-tables.description: Shows how to create a PDF document with separate pages, each containing a table imported from a DataTable using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-table-dynamic-row-count.title: Create PDF Table with Dynamic Row Count from DataTable
create-pdf-table-dynamic-row-count.description: Demonstrates how to build a DataTable with a runtime‑determined number of rows and import it into an Aspose.Pdf.Table, then save the result as a PDF document.

conditional-formatting-table-cells.title: Conditional Formatting of Table Cells in PDF
conditional-formatting-table-cells.description: Demonstrates importing a DataTable into an Aspose.Pdf Table and applying background colors to cells when numeric values exceed defined thresholds.

rotate-text-in-table-cell.title: Rotate Text Inside a Table Cell
rotate-text-in-table-cell.description: Demonstrates rotating text within a PDF table cell by setting the TextFragment's rotation angle and adding it to the cell.

rotate-table-90-degrees.title: Rotate Entire Table 90 Degrees Using Page Rotation
rotate-table-90-degrees.description: Shows how to rotate a whole table by setting the page rotation (transformation matrix) before adding the table to the PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

detect-merged-cells-in-pdf-tables.title: Detect Merged Cells in PDF Tables using TableAbsorber
detect-merged-cells-in-pdf-tables.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber with the FlowEngine to identify cells that span multiple rows or columns in PDF tables.

replace-merged-table-cells.title: Replace Merged Table Cells with Separate Cells in PDF
replace-merged-table-cells.description: Shows how to detect column‑spanned (merged) cells in PDF tables using TableAbsorber and replace them with individual cells by rebuilding the table structure.

add-footnote-references-in-table-cells.title: Add Footnote References in Table Cells
add-footnote-references-in-table-cells.description: Demonstrates inserting superscript footnote numbers inside table cells and adding matching footnote paragraphs at the end of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-table-at-specific-position.title: Insert Table at Specific Position in PDF
insert-table-at-specific-position.description: Demonstrates how to place a table at exact X and Y coordinates on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf by setting the Table's Left and Top properties and adding it to the page's paragraph collection.

right-align-table.title: Right Align Table in PDF
right-align-table.description: Demonstrates how to align a table to the right margin of a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf by setting the table's Alignment property and adjusting its left coordinate.

set-table-border-thickness-2-points.title: Set Table Border Thickness to 2 Points
set-table-border-thickness-2-points.description: Shows how to create a PDF table with Aspose.Pdf and configure its border thickness and color using the BorderInfo constructor before rendering.

create-table-double-border.title: Create Table with Double‑Border Style in PDF
create-table-double-border.description: Shows how to generate a PDF, add a 2x2 table, and apply a thick border to emulate a double border using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multiline-text-to-table-cell.title: Add Multiline Text to Table Cell in PDF
add-multiline-text-to-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to insert multiple TextFragment objects with line‑break fragments into a table cell to create multiline text in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-list-inside-table-cell.title: Add List Inside a Table Cell in PDF
add-list-inside-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to place a bulleted list inside a table cell by creating TextFragment paragraphs with bullet markers and adding them to the cell's Paragraphs collection.

create-numbered-list-in-table-cell.title: Create Numbered List Inside a Table Cell
create-numbered-list-in-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to add a table to a PDF document and populate a single cell with a numbered list using TextFragment paragraphs.

extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.title: Extract PDF Tables to CSV using TableAbsorber
extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF, extract each cell's text, and write the data to CSV files.

extract-pdf-tables-to-datatable.title: Extract Tables from PDF to DataTable
extract-pdf-tables-to-datatable.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to detect tables in a PDF, convert each table into a System.Data.DataTable, and populate it with cell text values.

set-custom-row-height-in-pdf-table.title: Set Custom Row Height in PDF Table
set-custom-row-height-in-pdf-table.description: Shows how to assign a fixed height to a specific row in an Aspose.Pdf table using the FixedRowHeight property.

auto-fit-table-row-height.title: Auto‑Fit Table Row Height in PDF
auto-fit-table-row-height.description: Shows how to let a table row automatically adjust its height to fit wrapped text by setting FixedRowHeight to 0 (AutoFit) using Aspose.Pdf.

set-fixed-row-height-table.title: Set Fixed Row Height for Table Rows in PDF
set-fixed-row-height-table.description: Demonstrates how to define a constant row height for all rows in an Aspose.Pdf table by setting the FixedRowHeight property before adding cells, and then saves the document.

set-landscape-orientation-add-wide-table.title: Set Landscape Orientation and Add Wide Table to PDF
set-landscape-orientation-add-wide-table.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF page to landscape orientation and insert a wide table that fits the page using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-page-add-table.title: Rotate PDF Page and Add Table
rotate-page-add-table.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, rotating the first page, creating a table with header and data rows, and inserting it onto the rotated page before saving.

extract-modify-tables-rotated-pages.title: Extract and Modify Tables on Rotated PDF Pages
extract-modify-tables-rotated-pages.description: Demonstrates how to detect rotated pages, use TableAbsorber to locate tables on those pages, and modify the text of a table cell before saving the PDF.

remove-tables-containing-keyword.title: Remove Tables Containing a Keyword from a PDF
remove-tables-containing-keyword.description: Demonstrates how to scan all tables in a PDF, detect a specific keyword in any cell, and delete the matching tables using Aspose.Pdf.
